column2: mutate(Activity = dei_vars[Variable], Percentage = round(100 * Count / nrow(dat), 1)) %>%
ggplot(dei_summary, aes(x = reorder(Activity, Count), y = Percentage, fill = Activity)) +
labs(title = "Social Justice & DEI Activities", subtitle = "Respondents could select multiple activities",
theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = aptc_navy), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
